pokemon:phanpy.name: Phanpy
pokemon:phanpy.summary: Phanpy uses its long nose to shower itself. When others gather around, they thoroughly douse each other with water. These Pokémon can be seen drying their soaking-wet bodies at the edge of water.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Phanpy uses its long nose to shower itself. When others gather around, they thoroughly douse each other with water. These Pokémon can be seen drying their soaking-wet bodies at the edge of water.
It is strong despite its compact size. It can easily pick up and carry an adult human on its back.
It is strong despite its compact size. It can easily pick up and carry an adult human on its back.
During the desert­ ed morning hours, it comes ashore where it deftly uses its trunk to take a shower.
It is strong despite its compact size. It can easily pick up and carry an adult human on its back.
PHANPY’s big ears serve as broad fans. When it becomes hot, it flaps the ears busily to cool down. Even the young are very strong.
As a sign of affection, it bumps with its snout. However, it is so strong, it may send you flying.
It swings its long snout around play­ fully, but because it is so strong, that can be dan­ gerous.
It swings its long snout around playfully, but because it is so strong, that can be dangerous.
It swings its long snout around playfully, but because it is so strong, this can be dangerous.
For its nest, Phanpy digs a vertical pit in the ground at the edge of a river. It marks the area around its nest with its trunk to let the others know that the area has been claimed.
It is strong despite its compact size. It can easily pick up and carry an adult human on its back.
It is strong despite its compact size. It can easily pick up and carry an adult human on its back.
For its nest, PHANPY digs a vertical pit in the ground at the edge of a river. It marks the area around its nest with its trunk to let the others know that the area has been claimed.
PHANPY uses its long nose to shower itself. When others gather around, they thoroughly douse each other with water. These POKéMON can be seen drying their soaking-wet bodies at the edge of water.
As a sign of af­ fection, it bumps with its snout. However, it is so strong, it may send you flying.
As a sign of affection, it bumps with its snout. However, it is so strong, it may send you flying.
It is strong despite its compact size. It can easily pick up and carry an adult human on its back.
It is strong despite its compact size. It can easily pick up and carry an adult human on its back.
As a sign of affection, it bumps with its snout. However, it is so strong, it may send you flying.
It is strong despite its compact size. It can easily pick up and carry an adult human on its back.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.

pokemon:donphan.name: Donphan
pokemon:donphan.summary: If Donphan were to tackle with its hard body, even a house could be destroyed. Using its massive strength, the Pokémon helps clear rock and mud slides that block mountain trails.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: If Donphan were to tackle with its hard body, even a house could be destroyed. Using its massive strength, the Pokémon helps clear rock and mud slides that block mountain trails.
It attacks by curling up, then rolling into its foe. It can blow apart a house in one hit.
It attacks by curling up then rolling into its foe. It can blow apart a house in one hit.
Because this POKéMON's skin is so tough, a normal attack won't even leave a scratch on it.
It attacks by curling up, then rolling into its foe. It can blow apart a house in one hit.
A DONPHAN is so strong it can easily haul a dump truck. Its hide has toughened to a rock-hard state. An ordinary sort of attack won’t even leave a scratch.
The longer and bigger its tusks, the higher its rank in its herd. The tusks take a long time to grow.
It has sharp, hard tusks and a rugged hide. Its TACKLE is strong enough to knock down a house.
It has sharp, hard tusks and a rugged hide. Its tackle is strong enough to knock down a house.
It has sharp, hard tusks and a rugged hide. Its TACKLE is strong enough to knock down a house.
Donphan’s favorite attack is curling its body into a ball, then charging at its foe while rolling at high speed. Once it starts rolling, this Pokémon can’t stop very easily.
It attacks by curling up, then rolling into its foe. It can blow apart a house in one hit.
It attacks by curling up, then rolling into its foe. It can blow apart a house in one hit.
DONPHAN’s favorite attack is curling its body into a ball, then charging at its foe while rolling at high speed. Once it starts rolling, this POKéMON can’t stop very easily.
If DONPHAN were to tackle with its hard body, even a house could be destroyed. Using its massive strength, the POKéMON helps clear rock and mud slides that block mountain trails.
The longer and bigger its tusks, the higher its rank in its herd. The tusks take long to grow.
The longer and bigger its tusks, the higher its rank in its herd. The tusks take long to grow.
It attacks by curling up, then rolling into its foe. It can blow apart a house in one hit.
It attacks by curling up then rolling into its foe. It can blow apart a house in one hit.
It has sharp, hard tusks and a rugged hide. Its Tackle is strong enough to knock down a house.
The longer and bigger its tusks, the higher its rank in its herd. The tusks take long to grow.
